title: Transfection of HEK cells with Lipofectamine 3000
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aqqo6","text":"how to transfect HEK cells with lipofectamine 3000 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"14s7g","text":"Lipofectamine 3000 - Lipofectamine 3000","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":21,"length":18}],"data":{}},{"key":"aq1he","text":"Opti-MEM reduced serum medium - Opti-MEM reduced serum medium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":32,"length":29}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"7E95BDD8D35D11EF80000A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/L3000008"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CA5946C2D35D11EF80000A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/31985062"}}}}
steps: Plate HEK cells in 24 well plate: 100K per well
Check cells --> less than ~60-70% confluent wait another day, if 60-70% confluent can begin lipofectamine transfection

Prepare 2 tubes per plasmid. One tube will have Opti-MEM reduced serum medium medium with the lipofectamine 3000 reagent and the other will have Opti-MEM reduced serum medium with the plasmid and P3000 reagent (see above graph)
Be sure to measure your DNA concentration before beginning the transfection - as you want a concentration of 0.5-5 ug/ul. Dilute accordingly
Add the solution from tube 2 into tube 1 and mix well
Incubate the mixture for 10-15 minutes at RT
Add 50 ul of the mixture from step 7 to each well. Gently swirl plates to ensure homogenous distribution of complex to the entire well

Calculate how many wells should be transfected. The below graph is the amount of materials needed to transfect 1 well in a 24 well plate. Multiply the materials accordingly depending on how many wells needed.
creator: Chelsie Steele
